---
title: "Schema & Variable Dictionary"
author: "World Bank / UNHCR Joint Team"
date: today
---

## Overview

Every harmonized file uploaded and approved through the pipeline must conform to
this schema. Variables are grouped into **mandatory** (must be present and
non-missing per the rules of the variable) and **optional** (included when
available in the source survey).

## Mandatory Variables

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `welfare` | Household welfare aggregate (consumption or income), as defined by the survey's official poverty methodology |
| `welfare_self` | Self-reliance-adjusted welfare measure |
| `weight` | Sampling weight |

## Optional Variables

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `age` | Age of the individual, in years |
| `educat4` | Educational attainment, 4-category classification |

::: {.bg-light-yellow .pa3 .br2 .f6}
**Status:** This variable dictionary is a starting point. Add full definitions,
allowed value ranges, units, and labeling conventions for each variable as they
are finalized.
:::
